metadata.name: Perform Standard Cost Update for Inventory

description: At the beginning of the year, a cost accountant needs to update the standard costs for all manufactured products based on new raw material prices and labor rates.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the bill of materials (BOM) and routing (labor steps) for each product.
Retrieve the new standard prices for all raw materials and the new standard labor rates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the updated cost data.

nodes.task_description: Perform a cost roll-up to calculate the new standard cost for each finished product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully calculates the new standard costs.

nodes.task_description: Update the item master file with the new standard costs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the inventory costing data in the ERP system.
